task: Using only the embedded packet (runs R1-R3 and specified options/specs), classify each run against specs, simulate the provided mitigation options, compute impacts on recoveries and impurities, perform sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, and recommend whether to advance the recipe to continuous trial. Deliver a reproducible Excel workbook (black_mass_leach_gate.xlsx) containing formulas/executable logic and a process gate memo (process_gate_memo.md) that documents intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity analyses, and a final decision table labeling each run/recipe as pass/warn/fail/needs_review. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
